business_outcome.problem_statement: Define a measurable business problem and target KPI uplift.

data_sources.name: Bureau of Labor Statistics Public Data API
data_sources.selection_rationale: Provides real API ingestion practice plus documented schemas for incremental loads and trend dashboards.
data_sources.ingestion_instructions: Use documented API/file endpoint, land raw extract to bronze with run metadata, then apply conformance tests in silver before publishing gold KPIs.

data_sources.name: NYC TLC Trip Record Data
data_sources.selection_rationale: Public trip-level facts are excellent for building medallion pipelines and KPI reporting exercises.
data_sources.ingestion_instructions: Use documented API/file endpoint, land raw extract to bronze with run metadata, then apply conformance tests in silver before publishing gold KPIs.

data_sources.name: Chicago Data Portal
data_sources.selection_rationale: Good source for reproducible city analytics projects with clear ingestion endpoints and metadata.
data_sources.ingestion_instructions: Use documented API/file endpoint, land raw extract to bronze with run metadata, then apply conformance tests in silver before publishing gold KPIs.

medallion_plan.bronze: Ingest raw source data with schema drift handling.
medallion_plan.silver: Apply cleaning, conformance, and quality checks.
medallion_plan.gold: Publish curated marts and KPI-ready tables.

project_story.executive_summary: Build a job-aligned medallion data platform project with measurable business outcomes and portfolio-ready artifacts.
project_story.challenge: Translate fragmented source data into trusted KPI reporting under tight delivery timelines.
project_story.approach: Implement bronze/silver/gold pipelines, data quality checks, and executive-friendly ROI dashboards.
project_story.impact_story: Demonstrate end-to-end ownership from ingestion through business narrative and stakeholder-ready metrics.

milestones.name: Discovery + Business framing
milestones.execution_plan: Interview stakeholders, map source systems, and define KPI ownership with acceptance criteria.
milestones.expected_deliverable: Signed project charter with KPI dictionary, source inventory, and scope boundaries approved by sponsor.
milestones.business_why: Aligning scope and KPI definitions early prevents rework and accelerates measurable ROI delivery.
acceptance_checks: Project charter signed by sponsor
KPI dictionary validated in coach review

milestones.name: Bronze/Silver implementation
milestones.execution_plan: Build incremental ingestion pipelines, apply schema evolution handling, and implement automated data quality gates.
milestones.expected_deliverable: Production-ready bronze/silver DAGs with tests, monitoring, and documented failure handling.
milestones.business_why: Reliable ingestion and conformance reduce reporting defects and improve trust in downstream analytics.
acceptance_checks: Pipeline test suite passes in CI
DQ threshold report validated and published

milestones.name: Gold + ROI dashboard
milestones.execution_plan: Model gold marts for executive questions, define semantic layer metrics, and build ROI dashboard narratives.
milestones.expected_deliverable: Validated KPI dashboard with traceable metric definitions and stakeholder walkthrough recording.
milestones.business_why: Clear KPI visibility enables faster decisions and proves business impact of the data platform investment.
acceptance_checks: Metric definitions validated against source tables
Stakeholder review walkthrough recorded

milestones.name: Final review + portfolio assets
milestones.execution_plan: Package architecture decisions, demo script, and retrospective into a portfolio-quality delivery artifact set.
milestones.expected_deliverable: Publish-ready repo and presentation assets that communicate technical depth and business outcomes.
milestones.business_why: Strong communication artifacts increase hiring signal and stakeholder confidence in project value.
acceptance_checks: Demo script dry-run recorded with feedback
Retrospective published with quantified outcomes

resource_plan.affiliate_disclosure: Some recommended resources may include affiliate links. Recommendations are selected for project relevance first.
resource_plan.trust_language: Resource recommendations are optional and do not change coaching feedback or project scoring.
